name: Manage campaigns
summary: Manage HubSpot campaigns from Marketing > Campaigns, including campaign actions, organization, collaboration, and campaign-level workflow.

name: Create campaigns
summary: Create HubSpot campaigns to organize related marketing assets and content, set campaign details, budget, and goals, and report on campaign performance.

name: Create campaigns using campaign templates
summary: Use campaign templates to create repeatable marketing campaigns, coordinate work, and guide campaign execution.

name: Associate assets and content with a campaign
summary: Associate assets such as emails, landing pages, CTAs, forms, social posts, and other content with a HubSpot campaign.

name: Campaigns | Frequently Asked Questions
summary: Review common questions about HubSpot campaigns, campaign behavior, asset association, and campaign reporting.

name: Understand Campaigns
summary: Understand how campaigns organize marketing assets and content so teams can measure collective marketing effectiveness.

name: Analyze your campaign ROI
summary: Review campaign ROI, spend, revenue, attributed revenue, and related performance metrics.

name: Understand your campaign's influenced contacts
summary: Analyze influenced contacts and understand which contacts engaged with assets related to a campaign.

name: Analyze your campaign's contact lifecycle stage metrics
summary: Review campaign contact lifecycle count and cost reports across default and custom lifecycle stages.

name: Use campaign attribution reports
summary: Use attribution reporting to understand campaign influence across contacts, deals, revenue, and marketing assets.
